name: Asaptic Labs
description: Asaptic Labs builds Agentic AI at four crossings — Quantum Computing, Physical AI, Autonomous Enterprise, and Care AI.

areas.label: × Quantum Computing
areas.summary: Post-quantum trust layer for agent identity, delegation chains, and irreversible authorisations. Today's crypto dies under quantum computing. Our open-source project builds the cryptographic infrastructure agents need before classical signature schemes are broken.

areas.label: × Physical AI
areas.summary: AI agents embodied in the eldercare physical-AI stack — humanoid companion care, rehab robot, clinical food, clinical data flywheel. kinaite is where agents meet atoms in the care physical domain.

areas.label: × Autonomous Enterprise
areas.summary: AI agents that run the whole company end-to-end — not copilots, not assistants, the workforce itself. CompanyForge engine takes a regulated vertical and turns it into a one-operator AI business. First implementation: an eldercare franchise network. Next vertical: PierForge cross-border supply chain.

areas.label: × Care AI
areas.summary: AI in regulated human care — multilingual swallowing-safety screening for frontline carers in residential care homes. CareEZ is where agents meet the regulated human care domain, operating inside the room where ground-truth data is built.

scope: Agentic AI at four crossings — Quantum Computing, Physical AI, Autonomous Enterprise, Care AI
